block_03: Mehnat ko aglay star par lay kay janay ka samay agya hai, Akhri battle main apni seat ko paka karien jo dikhaye ga kay kaun haiAsia ka no.1 trader,Maukay ka poora faiyda uthain ta kay app hisa lay sakain $5000 cash prize main. Is samay, agar app yahan hain, tu yhe sub astitv kay bare main hai, Aur who traders jo is 4th round main jeetain gay, unko akhri aur sub say bari league main muft hisa lena ka muaka milay ga!
block_04: 4th round kuch he dino main shuru hu ga, July 20 ko — Is samay, app Asia kay sub say bhetreen traders kay sath moqbalay karnay say siraf aik qadam door hain!
block_06: June 29-August 2, 2020, hum aoyajan karian gay 4 muft tournaments ka,aik tournment aik haftay main. Har muft tournament main 20 winners hun gay jinko ticket milay ga akhri battle main hisa lene ka jis ka prize money 5000$ hay.
